inputs.label: Trade Size (Lots)
inputs.businessContext: Trade size in standard lots (1 lot = 100,000 units typically)

inputs.label: Contract Size (Units per Lot)
inputs.businessContext: Number of base currency units per standard lot

inputs.label: Pip Size (Quote Currency)
inputs.businessContext: Pip definition in quote currency (e.g., 0.0001 for most pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs)

inputs.label: Quote to Account Currency Rate
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate from quote currency to account currency (amount of account currency per 1 unit of quote currency)
